languages.text: "Ваше спасение было ошибкой, Себериан. Ваша эпоха миновала и стала историей. Теперь уже — безвозвратно".
"Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."
languages.original_text: "Ваше спасение было ошибкой, Себериан. Ваша эпоха миновала и стала историей. Теперь уже — безвозвратно".

traits.locale_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."
"Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."
"Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

languages.text: «Su supervivencia fue un error, Seberian. Su era acabó. Es historia. Esta vez, de forma permanente».
languages.original_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

traits.locale_text: «Su supervivencia fue un error, Seberian. Su era acabó. Es historia. Esta vez, de forma permanente».

languages.text: “塞贝里安，你活下来就是个错误。你的时代早已翻篇，成为了历史。而这一次，你将迎来彻底的终结。”
languages.original_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安，你活下来就是个错误。你的时代早已翻篇，成为了历史。而这一次，你将迎来彻底的终结。”

languages.text: « Vous n'auriez pas dû survivre, Seberian. Votre règne appartient au passé. Irrévocablement, cette fois. »
languages.original_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'auriez pas dû survivre, Seberian. Votre règne appartient au passé. Irrévocablement, cette fois. »

languages.text: "Hayatta kalman bir hataydı Seberian. Devrin kapandı, tarih oldu. Bu sefer geri dönülmez bir şekilde hem de."
languages.original_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

traits.locale_text: "Hayatta kalman bir hataydı Seberian. Devrin kapandı, tarih oldu. Bu sefer geri dönülmez bir şekilde hem de."

languages.text: "Euer Überleben war ein Fehler, Seberian. Eure Zeit ist vorbei und mittlerweile Geschichte. Dieses Mal unumkehrbar."
languages.original_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Überleben war ein Fehler, Seberian. Eure Zeit ist vorbei und mittlerweile Geschichte. Dieses Mal unumkehrbar."

languages.text: 「お前たちの生き残りは、間違いだ、シベリア。お前たちの時代は過ぎ去り、歴史になった。今回は、取り返しのつかない。」
languages.original_text: "Your survival was a mistake, Seberian. Your era has passed and become history. This time, irrevocably."

traits.locale_text: 「お前たちの生き残りは、間違いだ、シベリア。お前たちの時代は過ぎ去り、歴史になった。今回は、取り返しのつかない。」
